name: proimg
description: ProImg microservices — see README.md for how to run locally

scripts.install:services: npm install -w services/shared -w services/auth-service -w services/pin-service -w services/chat-service -w services/notification-service -w services/gateway -w services/search-service
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n "gateway,auth,pin,chat,notification,search,frontend" -c "red,green,blue,yellow,magenta,gray,cyan" "npm run dev --prefix services/gateway" "npm run dev --prefix services/auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/pin-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/chat-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/notification-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/search-service" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
